channel.title: Sqrt-Decomposition on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Sqrt-Decomposition on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #1.5: Divisibility Blocking (Floor-Division Decomposition)
item.description: Divisibility blocking for O(sqrt n) floor-sum evaluation: lemma, single-variable loop, O(1) interval sum requirements, two-variable min-trick, multi-variable pseudocode, and ceiling-division blocking.
